title: Socratic answering evidence
description: Evidence produced by the socratic answering agent: the OPEN leaves of phase 1 answered automatically (code + web research), staged as the updated OPEN_QUESTIONS-*.adoc. Carries the run id whose `mm-tree-socratic-answering` artifact holds the answered tree.

run_id.description: GitHub Actions run id of the answering run; phase 2 downloads its `mm-tree-socratic-answering` artifact.

files.description: Manifest of the answered tree (QUESTION_TREE-*.adoc, the answered OPEN_QUESTIONS-*.adoc).
